cabin.description: In a dimly lit cabin, an old man sits by the fire surrounded by surprisingly lavish furnishings, given the condition of the cabin.
cabin.examineDetails: The old man's eyes flick toward you, then back to the fire. The furnishings look out of place here — too fine for a cabin this worn. Something was brought here recently.

cabin_kitchen.description: The rest of the small cabin opens into a humble country kitchen with warm wood cabinetry and copper accents. A heavy wooden door leads outside. On the tiny counter sits an impressive espresso machine that looks far too sophisticated for this rustic retreat.
cabin_kitchen.examineDetails: The espresso machine is spotless and recently used — grounds still warm in the portafilter. The exit door is bolted from the inside. Whoever lives here takes their coffee seriously.
